nodes.name: Platysteira
nodes.summary: Platysteira（Platysteira）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联8种鸟类，如Brown-throated wattle-eye、White-fronted wattle-eye、Black-throated wattle-eye等8种鸟类。

nodes.name: White-fronted wattle-eye
nodes.summary: White-fronted wattle-eye（Platysteira albifrons）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如White-fronted wattle-eye。

nodes.name: White-fronted wattle-eye
nodes.summary: The white-fronted wattle-eye (Platysteira albifrons) is a species of bird in the family Platysteiridae. It is endemic to Angola. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forests, subtropical or tropical mangrove forests, and subtropical or tropical dry shrubland. It is threatened by habitat loss. References
nodes.shortSummary: The white-fronted wattle-eye (Platysteira albifrons) is a species of bird in the family Platysteiridae. It is endemic to Angola.
